items.title: Rev. Jesse Jackson, civil rights leader and former presidential candidate, dies at 84
items.description: The Rev. Jesse Jackson was a civil rights icon, Baptist minister and two-time Democratic presidential candidate.

items.title: Hyatt Chairman Pritzker leaves board over Epstein ties
items.description: The 75-year-old billionaire heir said he would not seek reelection to the board at the annual stockholder meeting.

items.title: What's next for Cuba? Trump turns the screws as the island runs out of jet fuel
items.description: Cuba’s government appears to be on the brink of economic collapse amid a worsening energy crisis.
